productDisplayName: Peter England Men Stripes Black Shirt
description: Composition Black striped shirt, made of a cotton blend fabric, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar with a buttoned front placket, patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hem Fitting Slim Wash care Wash separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach Drip dry Warm iron Find your unique balance in the cusp of elemental colourplay with this black striped shirt from peter england's Dash collection. Crafted from a cotton blend fabric and stitched to perfection, this shirt offers exemplary comfort and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with crisp formals, a blazer, classy accessories and rich leather formal shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
